achievements.title: First Blood
achievements.description: Take your first hit. Welcome to dodge club.

achievements.title: Quickstep
achievements.description: Use the dash for the first time.

achievements.title: Apple Consumed
achievements.description: Reach the end of the song.

achievements.title: Untouched
achievements.description: Finish the song without taking a single hit.

achievements.title: Pacifist Runner
achievements.description: Finish the song without using dash.

achievements.title: Dash Hand
achievements.description: Use dash 100 times in a single run.

achievements.title: Close Call
achievements.description: Dash through a bullet's hot zone (i-frame save).

achievements.title: Unbroken Combo
achievements.description: Dodge 30 obstacles in a row without taking damage.

achievements.title: It's NOT Over
achievements.description: Use the auto-revive to keep going after a death.

achievements.title: Not Alone
achievements.description: Play with at least one other ghost in the lobby.

achievements.title: Loop Lover
achievements.description: Finish the song twice in one session with replay enabled.
